arts.ttl: Why isn’t Declan Rice playing for Arsenal against Tottenham in the Premier League?
arts.sum: Current rules state that players who kick the ball away after play has been stopped must be shown a yellow card, which, in that instance, was Rice’s second of the game . As a result, he doesn’t play against Spurs, but will be able to return for the Gunners’ next Premier League game away to City.

arts.sum: Manchester City are billed as front-runners for Musiala on the proviso he leaves Bayern with £120million mooted as a potential transfer fee. The highly-rated Germany international, who plays for Bayern Munich, is reported to have turned down the latest offer of a contract extension to extend his stay at the Allianz Arena.
